title: Terms of Service
introduction: Welcome to NyxVPN. By accessing or using our VPN service, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before using our service.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By creating an account, purchasing a subscription, or using our VPN service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.content:
NyxVPN provides:
• Encrypted VPN tunnels to protect your internet traffic
• IP address masking for online privacy
• Access to geo-restricted content
• No-logs policy enforcement
• Multi-device support

We continuously improve our service and may add or remove features without notice.

sections.title: 3. Prohibited Activities
sections.content:
You agree NOT to use our service for:
• Any illegal activities (hacking, fraud, terrorism)
• Sending spam or unsolicited messages
• Distributing malware or malicious software
• Copyright or trademark infringement
• Child exploitation or abuse
• DDOS attacks or network disruption
• Scanning for vulnerabilities
• Any activity that violates applicable laws

Violation may result in immediate termination without refund.

sections.title: 4. Subscription and Payment
sections.content:
• Subscriptions are billed in advance (monthly, yearly, or multi-year plans)
• All fees are non-refundable except as provided in our refund policy
• You authorize us to charge your payment method for recurring subscriptions
• Prices may change with 30 days notice
• You are responsible for any taxes applicable to your subscription
• We accept major credit cards, PayPal, and cryptocurrencies

sections.title: 5. Free Trial
sections.content:
• We offer a limited free trial for new users
• Free trial includes limited server access and bandwidth
• You may cancel during trial period without charge
• After trial ends, your subscription will auto-renew at current rates
• Abusing the free trial system may result in account termination

sections.title: 6. Refund Policy
sections.content:
• 7-day money-back guarantee for annual and monthly plans
• Refund requests must be made within 7 days of purchase
• Contact support@nyxvpn.com with your refund request
• Refunds processed within 5-10 business days
• No refunds for partial months or unused time
• Abuse of refund policy may result in service denial

sections.title: 7. Account Responsibility
sections.content:
You are responsible for:
• Maintaining account security (strong password, 2FA)
• All activities under your account
• Notifying us of unauthorized access
• Keeping your email address current
• Complying with all applicable laws

We are not liable for losses from unauthorized account access.

sections.title: 8. Service Availability
sections.content:
• We aim for 99.9% uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted service
• Scheduled maintenance will be announced in advance
• Force majeure events may affect service availability
• We may temporarily restrict access for security reasons
• No credits or refunds for temporary service interruptions

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.content:
To the maximum extent permitted by law:
• We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
• Our liability is limited to the fees you paid in the last 6 months
• We do not guarantee that our service will meet your requirements
• We are not responsible for third-party content accessed through our service
• You use our service at your own risk

sections.title: 10. Intellectual Property
sections.content:
• Our app, website, and content are protected by copyright
• You may not copy, modify, or reverse engineer our software
• Our trademarks and logos may not be used without permission
• Feedback you provide becomes our property
• You retain ownership of your data and communications

sections.title: 11. Termination
sections.content:
We may terminate or suspend your account:
• For violation of these Terms
• For non-payment of subscription fees
• For illegal or harmful conduct
• Upon your request (account deletion)
• For extended inactivity (2+ years)

Upon termination, you must cease using our service immediately.

sections.title: 12. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of Delaware, USA, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Delaware. For EU users, local consumer protection laws may apply.

sections.title: 13. Changes to Terms
sections.content:
• We may update these Terms at any time
• Material changes notified via email or in-app notice
• Your continued use after changes constitutes acceptance
• Previous versions archived and available upon request
• Disputes governed by version in effect at time of dispute

sections.title: 14. Contact Information
sections.content:
For questions about these Terms:

📧 Email: legal@nyxvpn.com
🌐 Website: https://nyxvpn.com/terms
